key_risks: Hawkish FOMC surprise on June 17 lifts yields and hits growth/small caps
Headline CPI reacceleration (4.2% YoY) prompts hawkish repricing
Oil decline signals demand weakness spilling to cyclicals

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum, AI capex tailwind, semis leadership continuing with SMH up 8% week.
Momentum factor outperforming with cooling core CPI supportive of risk.
Semiconductor export beneficiary with strong trend; weak dollar supportive.
Falling 2Y/10Y yields and dovish setup into FOMC favor small caps.
Yield curve steepening modestly, strong recent momentum, financials breadth improving.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt toward risk-on momentum/tech with cooling core inflation and falling yields into the June FOMC. Semis and Korea capture AI/export cycle; small caps and regional banks benefit from lower rates.
rationale_summary: Risk-on momentum, AI/semis leadership, and rate-sensitive small caps positioned for a benign FOMC and softer core inflation print.
